code: import axios from'axios';const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE,timeout:10000});export const pizzaAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/pizzas'),getById:id=>api.get(`/pizzas/${id}`)};export const orderAPI={place:orderData=>api.post('/orders',orderData),getById:orderId=>api.get(`/orders/${orderId}`),getAll:()=>api.get('/orders'),updateStatus:(orderId,status)=>api.patch(`/orders/${orderId}/status`,{status})};export default api;
